name: PULMONARY CALCIFICATIONS
definition: pleural space-occupying process decrease in surfactant production parenchymal fibrosis causing decreased lung volume densities 5-30 mm resulting in airspace filling BRONCHIAL MUCOCELE = BRONCHOCELE V-/Y-shaped branching tubular opacities of dilated bronchi filled with inspissated mucus

MR: high signal intensity on T2WI in atelectatic area
low-signal intensity on T2WI in atelectatic area
round / lentiform mass incompletely surrounded by lung
increased attenuation in periphery of mass
pleural thickening in vicinity of mass
curving of vessels + bronchi toward mass
"Luftsichel" sign = sharply marginated paraaortic crescent of hyperlucency (=
hazy opacification of left hilum + cardiac border
near horizontal course of left main bronchus
major fissure displaced anteriorly paralleling anterior chest wall
